retry_reason: Failure indicates the requested netlink object does not exist or invalid flags; retrying with the same input will yield the same failure.
contract_summary: Acquire-reference wrapper for batman-adv genl operations. Based on internal flags (NEED_MESH, NEED_HARDIF, NEED_VLAN), this function obtains a reference to the corresponding kernel object (batadv_priv, batadv_hard_iface, or batadv_meshif_vlan) via dedicated get functions and stores the pointer in info->user_ptr[0] or info->user_ptr[1]. The caller of the genl operation (the actual doit handler) receives these references and must not free them; instead, a corresponding post_doit function (e.g., batadv_post_doit) must be called after the operation completes to properly release all acquired references. On any error, previously acquired references (e.g., to the mesh interface) are released via dev_put to avoid leaks. The caller must check the return value: non-zero indicates failure and user_ptr contents are invalid.
